overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character walking along a wooden dock in an industrial harbor during golden hour. The character approaches a fisherman at the pier's end, observes large steamships and smokestacks silhouetted against the setting sun, then walks back through a busy dock area with workers and cargo.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing pier extending over water

events.description: begins walking forward along the wooden dock toward the fisherman
passes close to the fishing NPC, temporarily blocking the view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock toward a person fishing at the pier's end

notable_agents.action: standing at the end of the dock holding a fishing rod over the water

entered.detail: dark wooden warehouse structure with windows running along the left side of the dock
weathered wooden planks forming the walkway of the pier
large metal steamship with masts moored alongside the dock
thick vertical wooden posts along the edge of the dock

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a wooden fishing pier with a warehouse building on the left and a large steamship visible to the right. The camera walks forward along the weathered planks toward a fisherman standing at the end of the dock, silhouetted against the hazy golden hour light.

scene_state.functional_zone: harbor viewpoint at pier end with industrial ships

events.description: passes the fishing NPC and reaches the end of the dock, opening view to the harbor
camera looks directly toward the bright sun behind the steamship, creating strong lens flare and silhouettes
begins turning around to walk back toward the dock entrance

agents.ego_description: walking past the fisherman to the end of the dock, observing the large steamships and industrial harbor scenery

notable_agents.action: fishing with rod over the side of the dock, wearing a long coat

entered.detail: massive metal hull of steamship with prominent smokestack, backlit by the sun
tall wooden masts with rigging silhouetted against the sky
tall industrial smokestacks emitting dark smoke into the hazy sky

segments.scene_description: At the end of the pier, the view opens to reveal massive steamships moored in the harbor, their hulls and masts silhouetted against the bright golden sun. Industrial smokestacks rise in the background emitting smoke. The camera lingers on this view before beginning to turn back.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy industrial dock with warehouses and workers

events.description: turns away from the water to face the dock buildings and populated area
enters the populated dock area with multiple workers, carts, and cargo visible

agents.ego_description: walking back along the dock through the industrial area, passing workers and wooden cargo carts

notable_agents.action: worker leaning against wooden cargo crates near the warehouse wall
group of workers gathered near a wooden cart

entered.detail: dark wooden warehouse building returning to view on the left side
wooden wagon with large spoked wheels loaded with cargo
large brick industrial building with signage in the background
stacked wooden cargo crates and barrels along the dock

segments.scene_description: Turning back from the harbor view, the camera walks through a busy industrial dock area. Workers stand near wooden carts and stacked cargo crates, while brick warehouse buildings line the background. The smokestacks remain visible in the distance as the camera returns toward the dock entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a weathered wooden pier that transitions from a focused approach toward the harbor's edge into a wide industrial vista before returning through a bustling dockyard. It begins by moving forward past a warehouse building and a large steamship, heading toward a fisherman silhouetted against the hazy golden hour light. As the camera reaches the end of the pier, the view expands to reveal massive moored steamships and distant industrial smokestacks emitting smoke against a bright, setting sun. The scene then shifts as the camera turns back, walking away from the harbor and through a busy work area filled with laborers, wooden carts, and stacked cargo crates. Finally, the movement continues past brick warehouses with the smokestacks remaining visible in the distance as the camera returns toward the dock entrance.
